records.m_Talk_ENG: You are the only one left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are the only one left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are the only one left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does it feel like to not be able to protect anything even with that power of yours?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does it feel like to not be able to protect anything even with that power of yours?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does it feel like to not be able to protect anything even with that power of yours?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unforgivable...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unforgivable...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unforgivable...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could you... kill all those innocent people...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could you... kill all those innocent people...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could you... kill all those innocent people...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Innocent, you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Innocent, you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Innocent, you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How foolish. That fleeting body of yours is the hotbed of sin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How foolish. That fleeting body of yours is the hotbed of sin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How foolish. That fleeting body of yours is the hotbed of sin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't... make me laugh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't... make me laugh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't... make me laugh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall condemn that body myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall condemn that body myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall condemn that body myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Accept your end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Accept your end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Accept your end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't... move anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't... move anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't... move anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope... everyone is safe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope... everyone is safe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope... everyone is safe...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You are
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You are
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You are
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is not where you fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is not where you fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is not where you fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That voice... I knew it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That voice... I knew it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That voice... I knew it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you Cardinal Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you Cardinal Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you Cardinal Ecclesia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Soon, the Demon Lord will attack the remaining settlements of humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Soon, the Demon Lord will attack the remaining settlements of humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Soon, the Demon Lord will attack the remaining settlements of humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her goal is to expand into the realm of possibilities by bringing about the end of humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her goal is to expand into the realm of possibilities by bringing about the end of humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her goal is to expand into the realm of possibilities by bringing about the end of humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must go back and save the survivors from the apocalypse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must go back and save the survivors from the apocalypse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must go back and save the survivors from the apocalypse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll fight with you! As a member of the pilgrimage...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll fight with you! As a member of the pilgrimage...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll fight with you! As a member of the pilgrimage...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The pilgrimage is no more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The pilgrimage is no more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The pilgrimage is no more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that is left is a sinner who has fallen with false faith, imprisoned in armor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that is left is a sinner who has fallen with false faith, imprisoned in armor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that is left is a sinner who has fallen with false faith, imprisoned in armor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it the doing of the Demon Lord...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it the doing of the Demon Lord...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it the doing of the Demon Lord...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to you and Elysion...! Is it the Demon Lord's doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to you and Elysion...! Is it the Demon Lord's doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to you and Elysion...! Is it the Demon Lord's doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I... am also the one who created the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I... am also the one who created the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I... am also the one who created the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What do you mean? The Cardinal I know has been trying to defeat the Demon Lord
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What do you mean? The Cardinal I know has been trying to defeat the Demon Lord
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What do you mean? The Cardinal I know has been trying to defeat the Demon Lord
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no true cause of the apocalypse. Everyone has merely been sacrificed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no true cause of the apocalypse. Everyone has merely been sacrificed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no true cause of the apocalypse. Everyone has merely been sacrificed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, go back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, go back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, go back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body... is shining...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body... is shining...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body... is shining...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is not much time left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is not much time left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is not much time left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prepare for the end... with the others who share your will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prepare for the end... with the others who share your will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prepare for the end... with the others who share your will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Wait...! I still have more to say
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Wait...! I still have more to say
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Wait...! I still have more to say
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am sorry... for not keeping my promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am sorry... for not keeping my promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am sorry... for not keeping my promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A runaway sinner returning on her own will...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A runaway sinner returning on her own will...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A runaway sinner returning on her own will...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to sacrifice yourself just to save one human who will soon die?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to sacrifice yourself just to save one human who will soon die?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to sacrifice yourself just to save one human who will soon die?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too much talk from you, Sollicitatio.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too much talk from you, Sollicitatio.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too much talk from you, Sollicitatio.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing that will define our discord... is this cold blade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing that will define our discord... is this cold blade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing that will define our discord... is this cold blade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All talk from someone trapped in armor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All talk from someone trapped in armor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All talk from someone trapped in armor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or have you already forgotten? A hypocrite like you cannot protect anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or have you already forgotten? A hypocrite like you cannot protect anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or have you already forgotten? A hypocrite like you cannot protect anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though I may be a failed sinner...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though I may be a failed sinner...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though I may be a failed sinner...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not atone for my sins by neglecting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not atone for my sins by neglecting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not atone for my sins by neglecting.
